codeReview.summary: Compared to the prior failed round, the same blocking API-shape mismatch remains: ActionCard timestamps and mock values are still Date objects instead of JSON-serialized timestamp strings. Required type/mcp exports and realistic dataset coverage are otherwise present.

issues.description: Previous blocking issue is unresolved. ActionCard still types snoozedUntil/createdAt/completedAt as Date (lines 25, 27, 28), which does not exactly match GET /api/actions JSON response shape where timestamps serialize as strings.

Mock data still uses Date-producing helpers (daysAgo/daysFromNow) and assigns Date values to timestamp fields (e.g., lines 38, 152, 174, 194). This preserves the prior API-shape mismatch flagged in the previous scrutiny round.
Commit 6e39b36 includes unrelated .factory documentation artifacts (also .factory/validation/phase2-cross-area/assertions.md) beyond the requested scope of types and mock data.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The backend-worker skill's mandatory RED-first step does not account for types/static-data-only features, and this feature again shows an intentional deviation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback.followedProcedure=false with deviation on 'Write Tests First (RED)'; .factory/skills/backend-worker/SKILL.md has no explicit exception path for declaration-only work.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission guidance still lacks an explicit narrow-scope commit rule preventing unrelated .factory artifacts from being included in implementation commits.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: git show --stat 6e39b36 includes .factory/docs/phase2-backend-validation-assertions.md and .factory/validation/phase2-cross-area/assertions.md alongside the 3 feature files.

summary: Re-review result: fail. The prior blocking timestamp-shape issue is still not resolved (Date objects remain in shared ActionCard typings and mock action records), so the feature still does not meet the exact GET /api/actions response-shape requirement.
